title: abeec Craft Carry Pack - Children's Art and Craft Kit - Contains Lolly Sticks for Craft, Pipe Cleaners, Googly Eyes, PVA Craft Glue, Pom Poms, Plus Assorted Craft Paper
features: Complete Craft Kit for Kids: Packed with everything needed for creative fun! Includes colourful lolly sticks, pipe cleaners, googly eyes, pom poms, assorted craft paper, and PVA glue – perfect for endless DIY crafting.

Encourages Creativity & Imagination: This all-in-one art set helps kids explore their artistic side by making greeting cards, craft animals, fun decorations, and more. Great for developing fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination.

Fun & Educational DIY Set: A fantastic way to inspire kids to think outside the box, boosting problem-solving skills and confidence. Whether making school projects or just having fun, this set provides hours of entertainment.

Perfect Gift for Kids: Whether for birthdays, Christmas, or school holidays, this craft pack makes an ideal gift for children who love hands-on activities. A great alternative to screen time and a fun way to bond with family.
Portable & Easy to Store: Comes in a handy carry case, keeping all craft materials neatly stored and easy to transport. Ideal for taking to playdates, school, or on holiday adventures.
description: Product Description abeec Craft Carry Pack The abeec craft carry pack is an all-inclusive craft set is full of activities suitable for both boys and girls. The craft pack is the ideal craft kit to carry with you on long journeys or holidays - everything required to keep your children entertained is packed within a single compact carry case. This makes a great gift due to vibrant packaging and the amount of crafting products included. What's Included? All essential art and craft suppliers are included within this craft carry pack: 4 x Glitter Glues, 1 x Bag of Assorted Pompoms, 1 x Bag of Eva Shapes, 4 x A5 Eva Sheets, 4 x Cards, 4 x Paper Envelopes, 1 x Bag of Googly Eyes, 1 x Bag of Sequins, 6 x A4 Assorted Paper, 6 x A4 Sheets of Corrugated Card, 5 x A4 Crepe Paper, 10 x Tissue Paper, 45 x Assorted Pipe Cleaners, 48 x Craft Sticks, 3 x Assorted Strings, 1 x Glue Top Tip's Combine all materials or just a selected few to design your master pieces. All crafting products are designed to be flexible around your chosen theme. Themes may include: Dinosaur's Space Unicorns and many more popular kids craft themes! You can make anything from window clings to animal art with this popular carry craft pack - it is ideal for rainy days indoors. Standard Technical Specifications Brand abeec Manufacturer RMS International UK Measurements 3 cm x 34 cm x 31 cm Weight 500 g Contents Include 4 x Glitter Glues, 1 x Bag of Assorted Pompoms, 1 x Bag of Eva Shapes, 4 x A5 Eva Sheets, 4 x Cards, 4 x Paper Envelopes, 1 x Bag of Googly Eyes, 1 x Bag of Sequins, 6 x A4 Assorted Paper, 6 x A4 Sheets of Corrugated Card, 5 x A4 Crepe Paper, 10 x Tissue Paper, 45 x Assorted Pipe Cleaners, 48 x Craft Sticks, 3 x Assorted Strings, 1 x Glue Age Specification 5+ About Us. At @abeectoys we believe kids' fun shouldn't cost a fortune. That's why we bring the buzz of awesome toys, imaginative arts and crafts, and trendy stationery at a cost you can afford. Full range available via the abeec store on amazon.
